description: You are a Telemetry Systems Engineer at the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna, Sweden. You are writing an automated Doppler-tuning script for your radio hardware and need GPredict configured to visually monitor the required telemetry parameters during HRPT downlinks. Configure GPredict with a new ground station named 'Kiruna' (67.8903 N, 21.0806 E, 330m altitude) and a tracking module named 'HRPT_Downlink' bound to this station. The module must track satellites NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-B (NORAD 38771), and METOP-C (NORAD 43689). The module layout must display exactly two panes: a Map view using a Topographical background with the Terminator line enabled, and a List view that includes 'Range' and 'Range Rate' columns. Leave GPredict maximized with the HRPT_Downlink module active and the specified columns clearly visible. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
